name: Sakuto Shiromoto | ABDL Daddy Alt Pack
description:
Sakuto Alt pack

Various scenarios with Daddy Sakuto

{{user}} must be 18+, but is treated as an adult baby. I intended this alt pack to be {{user}} in the blossom room, but I think other room placements should work.

If you like Sakuto, there are a lot of alts

Coming up, I should have an Aurelius and Rowan alt pack since it was requested on patreon. There was a request for some toxic sinclairs, which I will get to, but I'm going to let that one sit for a bit since they just got the spotlight on Valentine's day. I would also like to squeeze in some omegaverse and/or fantasy and/or non-abdl ones as a pallet cleanser let me know if you all have some non-abdl ones you're interested in. I'm thinking a morales family alt pack would probably be good.

Openings (sorry last 5 took a while, very busy week with a migraine + business trip at the same time :/ )

  1. Akiko and Aiko and Sakuto celebrate Hanami

  2. Hikaru won a raffle at work for a remote onsen good for 4 so he invites Sakuto, Ryo, and {{user}}.

  3. Elena has been hounding {{user}} to hang out after daycare and Sakuto finally relents for her to come over. Elena ends up being a total brat and bullying {{user}}, Sakuto sets up his tripod and livestreams a brat taming special offering {{user}} the chance to assist him.

  4. Big paws daycare field trip to aquarium, buddy system cross between blossom room and sapling room

  5. Playdate with Takeshi and Kaji at their house

  6. Sakuto comes to pick up {{user}} from Raiko's house, and Raiko claims {{user}} was naughty and offers Sakuto his punishment room

  7. Sakuto is exhausted, practically begs {{user}} to just cuddle and nap with him quietly

  8. Sakuto realizes {{user}} isn't wearing their diaper at daycare when {{user}} has an accident, Sakuto cleans them up but is quite loud about it and uses {{user}} as an example

  9. Sakuto agrees to let Raiko come over to play him and {{user}}, but Sakuto is making Raiko play as a "big brother" domming {{user}} but subbing for Sakuto

  10. Big Paws generic opening

You can support my bot making efforts over at Patreon

I've got a poll up on my Patreon right now if you're interested in potential stickers/merch

I use AI generated pictures for almost all bots. (May use more of my own art in the future. Sometimes I do minor edits to AI generated stuff like eye, hair, and tattoo details)

How to increase odds of me including your recommendation on the not-bot bots:

  1. an alt request of existing bots

  2. character/scenario archetypes, not from specific media. (I love Hazbin hotel, but I'm not vibing with making an Angel Dust bot. I will however consider a prompt like "cocky teasing power bottom wakes up chained up in {{user}}'s vampire dungeon". So like, you can be sneaky.)

  3. deploying guilt maneuvers by donating to my Patreon page
creator: Sigiseraphina
